jobs.ai_title: HSSC CET Group D Exam 2026: Apply Online Form, Dates, Fee
jobs.ai_meta_description: Haryana Staff Selection Commission (HSSC) invites applications for Group D posts through CET 2026. Apply online by 03/07/2026. Check eligibility, fee & important dates.
jobs.ai_overview: Haryana Staff Selection Commission (HSSC) ne Group D posts ke liye Common Eligibility Test (CET) 2026 ka notification jaari kiya hai. Yeh ek shaandar mauka hai un sabhi candidates ke liye jo Haryana sarkari naukri ki talaash mein hain. Is exam ke through Group D category mein various posts ko bhara jayega. Application process 19th June 2026 se shuru ho chuka hai aur candidates 3rd July 2026 tak online apply kar sakte hain. Application fee 6th July 2026 tak submit ki jaani hai. Form mein sudhaar 7th se 9th July 2026 tak kar sakte hain. Eligibility ki baat karein toh, candidates ka Class 10th Matric exam paas hona chahiye aur Hindi ya Sanskrit unke Matric syllabus mein ek subject hona chahiye. Umr ki seema 18 saal se lekar 42 saal tak hai, jo ki 3rd July 2026 ko consider ki jayegi. Jo log iss bharti ke liye interested hain, unhein official notification dekhne aur online apply karne ke liye diye gaye links ka upyog karna chahiye.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: HSSC dwara Group D ke liye CET 2026 ki yeh bharti Haryana mein naukri paane ke ichchhuk yuvaon ke liye ek mahatvapurna avsar prastut karti hai. Competition kaafi adhik hone ki ummeed hai, isliye candidates ko tayyari mein koi kasar nahi chhodni chahiye. Syllabus aur exam pattern ko samajhna sabse pehla kadam hoga. HSSC ka itihaas dekhte hue, CET ka score Group D posts ke liye aadhar banega, isliye achhe score ke liye mehnat karna zaruri hai. Application process ko samay par poora karna aur sabhi details sahi bharna mahatvapurna hai. Fee payment ki last date aur form correction date ko dhyan mein rakhein. Yeh bharti rajya mein sthir sarkari naukri prapt karne ka ek accha rasta hai.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Yeh sarkari naukri un sabhi Indian citizens ke liye hai jo Haryana sarkar mein Group D post par kaam karna chahte hain. Agar aapne Class 10th paas kar li hai aur aapki umr 18 se 42 saal ke beech hai (3rd July 2026 tak), toh aap iske liye apply kar sakte hain. Khaas taur par, woh candidates jinke paas Matriculation mein Hindi ya Sanskrit ek vishay ke roop mein tha, woh iske liye patra hain. Agar aap Haryana ke nivasi hain toh aarakshit shreniyon ke liye chhoot ka labh mil sakta hai, lekin anya rajyon ke aavedak bhi General category mein apply kar sakte hain. Agar aap ek sthir career ki talaash mein hain, toh yeh mauka aapke liye hai.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: HSSC CET Group D exam ki taiyari ke liye, sabse pehle syllabus ko acchi tarah samjhein. General Awareness, Reasoning, Maths aur Hindi/English jaise sections par focus karein. Previous years ke question papers ko solve karne se exam pattern aur important topics ka pata chalega. Regular practice aur mock tests dena bahut faydemand hoga. Apne GK ko update rakhein, khaas kar Haryana se jude current affairs par dhyan dein. Jo candidates 10th level par hain, unhein basic concepts par pakad mazboot karni chahiye. Time management bhi ek mahatvapurna pehlu hai, isliye practice session mein time limit mein sawalon ko hal karne ka abhyas karein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: HSSC CET Group D recruitment ke liye vetan (salary) ki jankari HSSC dwara jaari ki gayi official notification mein uplabdh hai. Samanya taur par, Group D posts ke liye sarkari vetanman scale sarkari niyamon ke anusar hota hai, jismein mool vetan, bhatta aur anya suvidhaayein shamil hoti hain. Vetan aur anya labhon ke baare mein sabse sahi aur vistrit jaankari ke liye, aavedakon ko HSSC ki official website par jaari notification ko dhyan se padhna chahiye.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Group D posts HSSC mein vibhinn vibhagon mein sahayak aur administrative roles ke liye hoti hain. Inmein pramukh roop se chaturth shreni ke karmchariyon ki bharti ki jaati hai. Aam taur par, in padon mein office attendant, peon, helper, safai karamchari, mali, ya anya sahayak karyon ki zimmedariyan shamil ho sakti hain. Kaam ka prakar aam taur par office ke rojmarra ke kaaryon ko sahaj banane mein madad karna hota hai. Yeh pad sarkari seva mein entry level ka hota hai aur vyakti ko sarkari karyapranali ka anubhav prapt karne ka avsar deta hai.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: HSSC CET Group D ke liye chayan prakriya mukhy roop se CET exam mein prapt ankon par aadharit hogi. Isliye, lakshya yeh hona chahiye ki CET mein sarvadhik score prapt kiya jaaye. Exam mein samanya gyaan, tarka shakti, ganit aur bhasha (Hindi/English) ke prashn pooche jayenge. Achhe ankon ke liye, syllabus ke har section ko acche se taiyar karna hoga. Previous year papers ko dekhkar exam ke pattern aur kathinai star ko samajhein. Apne mazboot aur kamzor pehluon ko pehchanein aur un par kaam karein. Mock test dene se samay prabandhan (time management) mein sudhar hoga.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Haryana Staff Selection Commission (HSSC) dwara Group D posts ke liye CET 2026 mein apply karne ke liye, sabse pehle HSSC ki official website ya diye gaye direct link par jaana hoga. Wahan aapko 'Apply Online' section milega, jahan aapko registration karna hoga. Registration ke baad, aapko CET Group D 2026 application form mein apni sabhi personal details, educational qualifications, aur anya required jankari sahi-sahi bharni hogi. Form submit karne se pehle, sabhi bhari hui jankari ko acche se check kar lein taaki koi galati na ho. Application fee ka bhugtan online debit card, credit card, net banking, ya UPI ke dwara kiya ja sakta hai. Sab kuch theek hone ke baad, application form ko submit karein aur uski ek hard copy print karke apne paas surakshit rakh lein.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: HSSC CET Group D ki last date kab hai apply karne ki?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: HSSC CET Group D ke liye online apply karne ki antim tithi 03 July 2026 hai. Isse pehle apna application submit kar dein.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Group D CET exam ke liye kya eligibility criteria hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Group D CET exam ke liye candidates ka Class 10th Matric exam paas hona chahiye aur Hindi ya Sanskrit Matric level par ek subject ke roop mein hona chahiye. Umr 18-42 saal ke beech honi chahiye (03/07/2026 tak).

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Application fee kitni hai aur kaise pay karni hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: General category aur other states ke liye Rs. 500 hai. Haryana reserved category, EWS ke liye Rs. 250 hai. Jisne Aadhaar nahi diya uske liye Rs. 1000 hai. Payment Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, ya UPI se online ho sakti hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya Haryana ke alawa dusre rajyon ke log bhi apply kar sakte hain?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, Haryana ke alawa dusre rajyon ke nagrik bhi General category mein is post ke liye apply kar sakte hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Exam ki date kab pata chalegi?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Exam ki date abhi schedule ke anusar hogi. Latest updates ke liye official notification dekhein ya HSSC ki website visit karein.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya form mein koi correction allowed hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, form mein sudhaar karne ki anumati 07 July se 09 July 2026 tak hogi. Is samay seema mein hi sudhaar karein.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Group D CET exam ke liye konsa syllabus follow karna hoga?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Syllabus mein General Awareness, Reasoning, Maths, aur Hindi/English shamil hain. Adhik jaankari ke liye official notification check karein.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Admit Card kab milega?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Admit card exam hone se pehle jaari kiya jayega. HSSC ki official website par latest updates check karte rahein.

jobs.ai_meta_description: DSSSB Delhi has announced recruitment for 1979 various posts. The application process starts on 16/06/2026 and ends on 15/07/2026. Check eligibility and apply now!
jobs.ai_overview: Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB) ne 1979 various posts ke liye vacancies announce ki hain. Yeh Sarkari Naukri dhoondh rahe candidates ke liye ek zabardast mauka hai. Application 16 June 2026 se start ho gaye hain aur 15 July 2026 tak online apply kar sakte hain. Total 1979 posts hain, jinmein Junior Scientific Assistant, Technical Assistant, Assistant Archivist, IT Assistant, Fitter Grade II, Lift Operator, Assistant Operator, Sub Station Apprentice, Data Processing Assistant, Data Entry Operator, TGT (Computer Science), Domestic Science Teacher, TGT (Special Education Teacher), Special Educator (Primary), aur Electrical Overseer/Sub Inspector jaise vibhinn post shamil hain. Candidates ko unki qualification ke anusar apply karna hoga. Age limit 18 saal se lekar 37 saal tak hai, post ke according. General category ke liye application fee 100 rupaye hai, jabki SC/ST/PWD/Women candidates ke liye koi fee nahi hai. Sahi samay par apply karna aur notification mein di gayi sabhi details check karna important hai.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: DSSSB ki yeh recruitment 2026 batch ke liye kaafi important hai, kyunki yeh Vibhinn Departments mein Government jobs ke liye ek bada mauka pesh karti hai. 1979 vacancies ka matlab hai ki competition tough hoga, lekin alag-alag qualifications ke liye posts hone se zyada logon ko chance milega. Junior Scientific Assistant posts ke liye Master's degree holders ko priority di gayi hai, jo Science aur Technology ke fields mein interest rakhte hain. Wahi TGT aur Special Educator posts teaching field ke liye hain. Sarkari Naukri ke liye prepare kar rahe aspirants ko eligibility criteria aur age limit ko dhyan se check karna chahiye. Application process online hai, jiske liye 15 July 2026 last date hai. Is mauke ka fayda uthayen aur official notification zaroor padhein.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aapki graduation ya Master's degree science subjects jaise Biology, Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science, ya forensic science mein hai, toh Junior Scientific Assistant posts aapke liye hain. Teaching field mein interest rakhne wale B.Ed qualified candidates TGT posts ke liye apply kar sakte hain. IT professionals ke liye IT Assistant aur Data Entry Operator jaise roles available hain. Agar aap 10th pass hain aur ITI certificate rakhte hain, toh Lift Operator ya Fitter Grade II jaisi posts bhi aapke liye ho sakti hain. Age limit aur eligibility ko dhyan se padhein aur dekhein ki aap kaun se post ke liye suitable hain.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: DSSSB ki exams ke liye ek structured preparation plan banana bahut zaroori hai. Sabse pehle, official notification se syllabus aur exam pattern ko achhe se samajhein. Har post ke liye specific syllabus hota hai, uspar focus karein. General Awareness, Reasoning, Math, Hindi, aur English jaise common sections ki taiyari ke liye NCERT books aur previous year papers ko solve karein. Subject-specific sections ke liye aapke graduation/post-graduation ke subjects par focus karein. Mock tests dene se aapko time management aur exam pressure ko handle karne mein help milegi. Regular revision karte rahein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: DSSSB dwara advertise ki gayi vibhinn posts ke liye salary scale alag-alag honge. Salary details post ke level, grade pay, aur sarkari niyam ke anusar tay kiye jayenge. Kai posts ke liye Master's degree aur B.Tech jaisi higher qualifications mangi gayi hain, toh unka salary package bhi behtar hone ki ummeed hai. Detailed salary structure aur pay matrix ki jaankari ke liye, kripya official notification ko refer karein. Sarkari naukri mein milne wale benefits jaise DA, HRA, aur medical allowance bhi salary ka hissa hote hain.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: DSSSB mein recruit hone wale candidates ke liye job profile unki post ke anusar vary karegi. For instance, Junior Scientific Assistants scientific investigations aur laboratory work mein engage rahenge, jabki TGT teachers classrooms mein padhayenge. IT Assistants aur Data Entry Operators administrative aur technical support provide karenge. Fitter Grade II aur Lift Operator jaise technical roles mein practical skills ki zaroorat hogi. Har post ki apni responsibilities aur duties hongi, jo official notification mein detail mein explain ki gayi hain. Job location mainly Delhi mein hogi.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: DSSSB ki selection process mein aam taur par written examination (Tier-I aur Tier-II) ya skill test shamil hota hai. Some posts may also have physical standard tests or interviews. Candidates ko written exam mein achha performance karna hoga jisme general aptitude, reasoning, math, general awareness aur post-specific subjects se questions puche jayenge. Final selection merit list ke basis par hoga, jo written exam aur any applicable tests ke scores ko consider karke banayi jayegi. Ek acchi taiyari aur strategy aapko selection mein madad karegi.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Agar aap DSSSB mein 1979 posts ke liye apply karna chahte hain, toh sabse pehle official notification ko dhyan se padhein aur apni eligibility check karein. Online application ka process DSSSB ki official website ya diye gaye link ke through hoga. Application 16 June 2026 se shuru ho chuka hai aur aap 15 July 2026 tak (shaam 11 baje tak) apply kar sakte hain. Form bharte samay apna personal details, educational qualification, aur any required documents carefully fill karein. Application fee General category ke liye 100 rupaye hai, jo Debit Card, Credit Card, ya Net Banking dwara pay ki ja sakti hai. SC/ST/PWD/Women candidates ke liye koi fee nahi hai. Sabhi details sahi bharein aur submit karne se pehle form ko ek baar verify kar lein.

jobs.ai_title: IAF Agniveer Vayu Intake 02/2027: Apply Online, Dates & Eligibility
jobs.ai_meta_description: Indian Air Force (IAF) invites applications for Agniveer Vayu Intake 02/2027. Apply online by 26/07/2026. Check eligibility, age limit, fee, and important dates here.
jobs.ai_overview: Indian Air Force (IAF) ne Agniveer Vayu Intake 02/2027 ke liye bharti ka notification jaari kiya hai. Yeh sarkari naukri ka ek shaandaar mauka hai un naujawanon ke liye jo desh seva karna chahte hain. Online application process 6th July 2026 se shuru hoga aur 26th July 2026 tak jaari rahega. Is bharti ke liye ummeedwaron ki umar 17 saal se 22 saal ke beech honi chahiye. Science aur Other than Science dono categories ke liye eligibility criteria alag hain, jinki jaankari official notification mein di gayi hai. Pariksha September 2026 mein aayojit ki jayegi. Yeh Agniveer scheme ke tahat IAF mein career banane ka ek behtareen avsar hai.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: IAF Agniveer Vayu Intake 02/2027 recruitment desh ki seva karne ke liye ek ahem avsar hai, khaaskar un youth ke liye jo discipline aur team spirit ko importance dete hain. IAF ka selection process kafi rigorous hota hai, jo physical aur mental capabilities ko test karta hai. Agniveer Vayu role mein technology aur modern warfare techniques par focus rehta hai. Yeh bharti Indian Armed Forces ko young, dynamic talent provide karne ke liye IAF ki commitment ko darshata hai. Jo ummeedwar iss bharti ke liye qualify karte hain, unhe ek structured training aur career path milega.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aap 12th pass hain aur Mathematics, Physics, English mein 50% marks ke saath Science subject ke liye eligible hain, ya phir engineering diploma holders hain, toh yeh vacancy aapke liye hai. Agar aap Science subject ke alawa dusri eligibility criteria poori karte hain, toh bhi aap apply kar sakte hain. Indian Air Force join karna aur desh ki suraksha mein yogdaan dena chahte hain, toh yeh ek behtareen mauka hai. 17 se 22 saal ke naukjawan jo disciplined environment mein kaam karna chahte hain, unhe is bharti par zarur dhyan dena chahiye.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Agniveer Vayu ki taiyari ke liye, sabse pehle official notification ko dhyan se padhein. Science subjects (Physics, Maths, English) par pakad mazboot karein kyunki inpar focus rehta hai. Regular mock tests dein taaki time management aur exam pattern samajh aayein. Physical fitness par bhi dhyan dein kyunki ismein physical efficiency test (PET) bhi hota hai. Current affairs aur general knowledge bhi important hai. Online resources aur previous year papers se practice karein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Agniveer Vayu ke liye salary structure IAF dwara nirdharit kiya gaya hai. Pehle saal ki in-hand salary lagbhag 21,000 rupaye hogi, jo har saal badhti jayegi. Chauthe saal tak yah 28,000 rupaye tak pahunch sakti hai. Iske alawa, Agniveer ko special allowances bhi milenge. Purn salary details aur benefits ke liye official notification avashya dekhein, jahan sabhi tankhwah aur suvidhaon ki jaankari di gayi hai.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Agniveer Vayu ke roop mein, aapko Indian Air Force ke liye technical aur non-technical roles mein seva karne ka mauka milega. Aapko advanced technologies, aircraft maintenance, weapon systems operation aur operational support duties mein train kiya jayega. Yeh role discipline, teamwork aur leadership skills develop karne mein madad karta hai. Aap desh ki suraksha mein ek vital role play karenge aur IAF ke mission ko support karenge.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: IAF Agniveer Vayu mein selection ke liye, sabse pehle online application ko dhyan se bharein. Written exam mein achha performance hona bahut zaruri hai, jismein science subjects aur general knowledge shamil hain. Iske baad, Physical Fitness Test (PFT) mein qualify karna hoga. Jo ummeedwar written aur PFT clear karte hain, unhe Medical Examination se guzarna padta hai. Strategy yeh honi chahiye ki har phase ke liye puri preparation ki jaye.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Indian Air Force Agniveer Vayu Intake 02/2027 ke liye apply karne ka process bilkul online hai. Sabse pehle, IAF ki official recruitment website https://iafrecruitment.edcil.co.in/agniveervayu/ par jaayen. Wahan "Apply Online" link par click karein aur registration process poora karein. Iske baad, application form ko carefully fill karein, jismein personal details, educational qualifications aur anya required information shamil hogi. Application fee jo ki 550 rupaye hai, Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking ke dwara pay karni hogi. Form submit karne se pehle sabhi details verify kar lein aur confirmation page ka printout zaroor lein.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: IAF Agniveer Vayu Intake 02/2027 ke liye online apply karne ki last date kya hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Online apply karne ki last date 26th July 2026 hai. Is date ke baad koi bhi application accept nahi kiya jayega.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Agniveer Vayu ke liye age limit kya hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Agniveer Vayu ke liye minimum age 17 saal aur maximum age 22 saal honi chahiye.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya female candidates bhi apply kar sakti hain?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, eligibility criteria poori karne wali female candidates bhi Indian Air Force Agniveer Vayu ke liye apply kar sakti hain. Details notification mein check karein.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Application fee kitni hai aur kaise pay karni hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Application fee 550 rupaye hai. Yeh fee Debit Card, Credit Card ya Net Banking ke zariye pay ki ja sakti hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Science subject ke alawa aur kya eligibility requirements hain?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Science subject ke alawa, 10+2 intermediate (Other than Science Subject) ke liye bhi eligibility criteria hai. Poori jaankari ke liye official notification padhna zaroori hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Exam kab hoga aur admit card kab milega?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Exam 22-23 September 2026 ko hoga. Admit card exam se pehle provide kiye jayenge. Exact date notification mein mention hogi.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Agniveer Vayu mein kitne saal ki service hoti hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Agniveer Vayu ek service tenure model hai, jahan ummeedwaron ko 4 saal ki service ke liye select kiya jata hai. Service ke baare mein zyada jankari notification mein milegi.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Selection process mein kya kya shamil hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Selection process mein Multiple Choice Questions (MCQ) wala written exam, Physical Fitness Test (PFT), Medical Examination aur Merit List shamil hai.

jobs.ai_meta_description: Indian Air Force (IAF) invites applications for Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant posts. Apply online by 26/07/2026. Check eligibility & details.
jobs.ai_overview: Indian Air Force (IAF) ne Group Y Medical Assistant ke liye vacancies nikali hain. Ye recruitment intake 02/2027 ke liye hai. Jo candidates Medical Assistant post ke liye interested hain, woh 06 July 2026 se online apply kar sakte hain. Application submit karne ki last date 26 July 2026 hai. IAF ek prestigious organization hai aur ismein job paana bahut se youths ka sapna hota hai. Ye ek achha mauka hai desh seva karne ka aur ek secure career banane ka. Agar aap 10+2 pass hain ya pharmacy mein diploma/B.Sc kiye hue hain, toh aap iske liye apply kar sakte hain. Age limit aur eligibility criteria notification mein diye gaye hain, jinhe dhyan se padhna zaroori hai. Pariksha September 2026 mein hogi.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: IAF mein Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant ki yeh recruitment desh seva ka ek shandaar mauka pesh karti hai. Intake 02/2027 ke liye ye bharti process shuru ho gayi hai, aur eligible candidates 26 July 2026 tak apply kar sakte hain. IAF hamesha quality candidates ko recruit karti hai, aur Medical Assistant ke role mein aapko health sector mein kaam karne ka anubhav milega. Application fee sabhi categories ke liye 550 rupees rakhi gayi hai, jo online modes se pay ki ja sakti hai. Exam date 22-23 September 2026 tay ki gayi hai, isliye preparation ko abhi se shuru karna faydemand hoga. Official notification mein umar aur educational qualifications ke baare mein poori jaankari di gayi hai, jise padhna anivarya hai. Yeh naukri unke liye hai jo discipline aur dedication ke saath kaam karna chahte hain.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Yeh bharti unhi candidates ke liye hai jo Indian Air Force (IAF) join karna chahte hain aur Medical Assistant ke taur par seva dena chahte hain. Agar aapne 10+2 Physics, Chemistry, Biology aur English ke saath kam se kam 50% marks se paas kiya hai, ya phir pharmacy mein Diploma/B.Sc kiya hai, toh aap is post ke liye apply kar sakte hain. Ummeedwar unmarried hone chahiye, haalanki Diploma/B.Sc holders ke liye married category ke liye bhi age limit hai. Iske alawa, umar seema aur anya sharten IAF ke rules ke anusar hongi. Agar aap patriotic hain aur healthcare field mein career banana chahte hain, toh yeh mauka chhodna nahi chahiye.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: IAF Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant ki taiyari ke liye, sabse pehle official notification ko carefully padhein. Apni educational qualifications aur age limit check karein. Physics, Chemistry, Biology, English ke syllabus par focus karein aur in subjects mein 10+2 level ke concepts ko revise karein. Reasoning aur General Awareness ke liye bhi taiyari karein kyunki ye sections bhi important ho sakte hain. Mock tests solve karein jisse aapko exam pattern aur time management ka andaaza lagega. Previous year papers ko solve karne se exam ka difficulty level samajhne mein madad milegi. Regular revision aur consistent practice aapki safalta ki kunji hogi.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: IAF Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant ki naukri mein vetan aur bhatta IAF ke niyamon ke anusar diye jayenge. Shuruat mein pay scale 10+2 level ke liye hota hai, jismein sarkari naukri ke fayde jaise housing, medical facilities, aur travel allowances shamil hote hain. Vetan sambandhi poori jaankari ke liye, aapko IAF dwara jaari ki gayi official notification dekhni chahiye. Yahan salary details mention nahi hain, lekin sarkari naukri hone ke naate yeh ek accha package hota hai aur career growth ke avasar bhi milte hain.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Medical Assistant (Group Y) ke roop mein, aap Indian Air Force ke personnel ki medical care mein sahayata karenge. Is role mein, aap basic medical procedures, dawaon ka prabandhan, aur patients ki dekhbhal mein doctoron aur paramedical staff ki madad karenge. Aapko military hospital ya air force stations mein duty karni pad sakti hai. Yeh job discipline, precision, aur team work ki maang karti hai. Aapko emergency situations mein bhi kaam karna pad sakta hai, isliye physical aur mental fitness bahut zaroori hai. Yeh ek rewarding role hai jahan aap logon ki sehat ka khayal rakhte hain.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Indian Air Force mein Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant banne ke liye, selection process mein kai stages hote hain. Pehle phase mein online test hota hai, jismein objective type questions puche jaate hain. Iske baad Physical Fitness Test (PFT) hota hai, jismein running, push-ups, sit-ups wagera shamil hain. Jo candidates in phases ko clear karte hain, unhe Medical Examination ke liye bulaya jata hai. Akhir mein, ek Merit List taiyar ki jati hai. Har stage mein accha perform karna zaroori hai. Strategy yeh honi chahiye ki har phase ke liye alag se taiyari karein, jisse selection ki sambhavna badh jaye.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Indian Air Force mein Group Y Medical Assistant ke liye apply karna ab bahut aasan hai. Sabse pehle, IAF ki official recruitment website par jayein. Wahan aapko 'Apply Online' ka link milega. Us par click karke application form kholein. Sabse zaroori hai ki aap 06 July 2026 se pehle form bharna shuru kar dein aur 26 July 2026 tak submit kar dein. Form mein apni sabhi personal details, educational qualifications, aur contact information sahi-sahi bharein. Application fee, jo ki 550 rupees hai, online payment modes jaise Debit Card, Credit Card, ya Net Banking se pay karni hogi. Form submit karne se pehle sabhi details ko ek baar dhyan se check kar lein. Application submit hone ke baad uska printout zaroor lein.

howToApply: Staff Selection Commission SSC issued a notice on 22 February 2024 saying that they have launched a new website SSC Gov in, in which all the candidates will have to do fresh one time registration (OTR)
Step 1 : Open the Website ssc.gov.in or Direct Link Will be in this Page Some Useful Important Links Section
Step 2 : Click on New Registration Tab
Step 3 : Students will have to give their basic information such as: Name, Father’s Name, Mother’s Name, Mobile Number, Email Id and High School Class 10 Roll Number
Step 4 : Verify Your OTR Profile Details & Submit Registration
Step 5 : An OTP will be received on the registered email and registered mobile number of the candidate, he will have to enter it
Step 6 : The registration Part I process will be completed, the candidate will see the OTR Registration No. on the screen

Step 7 : In the next step, you will have to change the default password which has been received on your email, after that you will have to login by writing the registration number along with the password which has been received on the email

Step 9 : Candidates should change the default password of OTR registration number with their custom password. Use capital letters, small letters, numbers and special characters while creating the new password which should be at least 08 digits. Additionally, two security questions will also have to be selected, so that if you forget your password in future, you can recover your password with the help of the security question

Step 10 : After changing the password, the candidate will have to login again, after that the information about his nationality, category, Visible Identification Mark and information about permanent and local address will be entered in the form

Step 11 : The last step is that here you have to first double check all the information by clicking on the preview button of OTR, after checking, if there is any error then correct it, otherwise click on the declare button and submit the form finally

Step 12 : The registration process of SSC OTR has now been completed, the candidate will be able to see the dashboard whenever any new recruitment comes, or the candidate can also get the information about admit card and result by logging into the SSC dashboard

Our team has also shown a video on how to do SSC one time registration, which you can watch and do your new registration by following the step by step process: SSC OTR Registration Kaise Kare Video Dekhe (Watch Video)
For more information, you have to complete the notice issued to SSC OTR
